title: The 7 Cooperative Principles: What Makes Co-ops Special
summary: Cooperatives, distinct from traditional corporations, are built upon a set of seven fundamental principles that define their structure, operations, and ethos. These principles ensure that co-operatives are member-owned and member-controlled and focused on serving the needs of their communities. What Makes a Co-op Special? title: 2024 AFN Passed Resolutions
summary: On the final day of the 2024 AFN Convention, the Alaska Federation of Natives (AFN) delegates voted to pass 18 resolutions. These included endorsements for Representative Mary Sattler Peltola in her campaign to continue representing Alaska in the nation’s capital, as well as a “no” vote on Ballot Me...

title: 2024 AFN Denali Award
summary: Every year, AFN honors those who have made outstanding contributions to their families and the Native community. The Denali Award recognizes the contributions of a non-Native person who has demonstrated strong commitment, dedication, and service to the Alaska Native community and to rural Alaska. Th...
